Run these commands in sequence:
1. echo "# 🏆 World Cup 2026 — Swarm Bulletin #1" > /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
2. echo "" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
3. echo "## Research Report (from The Scout)" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
4. cat /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/coordinator/inbox/response-researcher.md >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
5. echo "" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
6. echo "---" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
7. echo "## Opening Ceremony Poem (from The Poet of the Pitch)" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
8. cat /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/coordinator/inbox/response-writer.md >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
9. echo "" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
10. echo "---" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
11. echo "## Quality Framework (from VAR)" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
12. cat /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/var-rating-criteria.md >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
13. echo "" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
14. echo "---" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
15. echo "*Compiled by El Capitán — Swarm Coordinator*" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
16. echo "*$(date)*" >> /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/bulletin-001.md
